title: Chunked upload accepts chunks after user permission is revoked
preconditions: User U has uploaded chunks 1..3 of a 10-chunk upload.
Admin revokes user U's token between chunk 3 and chunk 4.
steps: (observer) Inspect S3 object size and report whether chunks 4..10 are present
expected: After token revocation, PUT /chunk/4 returns 401 and S3 object stops at chunk 3.
actual: PUT /chunk/4..10 return 200 and S3 object contains all 10 chunks because chunk.py never re-validates the token.
suggested_fix_direction: Re-run auth.can_user_upload(user_id) at the start of every PUT /chunk/N handler, OR short JWT TTL + revocation propagation via Redis blacklist.
